title: MAP 6.13: Design outcome feedback and Library-layer research path
description: Wave 6 from MAP 6.13 plan. Define outcome events, validator blind-spot metrics, Library layer viability measurement, and Research System pass over external repo candidates before any Library/tool adoption. Read MAP_System/artifacts/planning/map-613-master-implementation-plan.md, MAP_System/RESEARCH_SYSTEM.md, MAP_System/research/README.md, MAP_System/events/README.md, MAP_System/CONTEXT_SYSTEM.md, Guidelines/6.13/MAP-Repo-Review-List.md, and Guidelines/6.13/files3/MAP-Tool-Evaluation-Appendix.md before editing.
acceptance_criteria: Outcome feedback spec distinguishes validation pass from real-world outcome and defines validator blind-spot rate.
Research artifacts evaluate claude-bedrock, agentcairn, knowledge-graph-driver-rag hop-limit/token-budget pattern, agent-collab-skills acceptance gate, and codexia worktree/locking relevance.
Library viability measurement covers compression ratio, detail-needed rate, file churn, and staleness invalidation requirements.
Task makes no adoption decision without a Research Summary and measurement plan.
